mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MENU_FILE ( FILE_ID, MENU_ID, ORIGINAL_NAME, SAVED_NAME, FILE_PATH, CONTENT_TYPE, FILE_SIZE, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( MENU_FILE_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{menuId}, #{originalName}, #{savedName}, #{filePath}, #{contentType}, #{fileSize}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT FILE_ID AS fileId, MENU_ID AS menuId, ORIGINAL_NAME AS originalName, SAVED_NAME AS savedName, FILE_PATH AS filePath, CONTENT_TYPE AS contentType, FILE_SIZE AS fileSize, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM MENU_FILE WHERE MENU_ID = #{menuId}
